frequency_range: 500 Hz to 100+ kHz (pulsed calls + whistles + echolocation clicks)
population: Southern Resident Killer Whales: J, K, L pods; ~73 individuals as of 2026; Endangered since 2005

theory_nodes.concept: E=9 + E=9 = E=18: THE ENGINE SUMMIT MAXIMUM. Both tracks at E=9 simultaneously for the only time in the engine. Nirvana (S36 first E=9) + Orca greeting (SPS E=9): full convergence on both tracks. The engine's highest combined energy.
theory_nodes.description: E=18 combined energy -- the engine Summit Maximum. Both tracks at E=9 simultaneously.

theory_nodes.concept: FULL CONVERGENCE as the structural principle: Nirvana's three voices (Cobain guitar/vocals + Novoselic bass + Grohl drums) achieving maximum through convergence. Orca greeting: all pod members (20-80 animals) vocalizing simultaneously achieving maximum through convergence. Both events require the group; no individual produces the maximum alone.
theory_nodes.description: Full convergence as the shared structural principle between Nirvana and Orca greeting.

theory_nodes.concept: Three vocalization types simultaneously: pulsed calls (pod-specific dialects, 500 Hz-5 kHz + harmonics), whistles (2-20 kHz, close-range coordination), echolocation clicks (20-100 kHz, broadband navigation). Full-spectrum acoustic event. Cultural transmission of pulsed call dialects: learned from older family members, persists across generations.
theory_nodes.description: Three simultaneous vocalization types and the cultural transmission of pod dialects.

theory_nodes.concept: Southern Resident Killer Whale status: J/K/L pods, ~73 animals (2026), Endangered since 2005. Down from 98 in mid-1990s. Primary threats: Chinook salmon decline, vessel noise, PCB/PBDE contamination. ESA recovery plan requires Chinook salmon recovery throughout Pacific Northwest watershed.
theory_nodes.description: SRKW population status, threats, and recovery requirements.

theory_nodes.concept: Acoustic physics of the Salish Sea: sound 1,500 m/s (vs. 340 m/s in air). Greeting ceremony detectable by hydrophone 20-50 km range. Three-dimensional acoustic space: depth to 280 m provides vertical acoustic path. The greeting ceremony fills the Salish Sea's volume, not just a surface area.
theory_nodes.description: Seawater acoustic physics expanding the greeting ceremony's spatial reach.

cross_references.relationship: Chinook salmon are the SRKW's primary prey. SRKW recovery requires Chinook recovery. The salmon run (307) and the Orca greeting (311) are ecologically linked through the food chain.
First SPS E=9 in the cluster. Marten scream starts the E=9 maximum zone; Orca greeting continues it as the third E=9 entry.
Succeeding degree at E=9. E=9 sustained for two consecutive degrees: Orca greeting (311) + storm surge (312). Then E=18 with Soundgarden.

s36_pair.pairing_note: E=9 + E=9 = E=18. THE ENGINE SUMMIT MAXIMUM. Full convergence: Nirvana's three-voice convergence (Cobain/Novoselic/Grohl as unified acoustic event) paired with Orca pod's full multi-voice convergence (20-80 animals simultaneously). Both achieve their maximum only through the group. Both rare. Both unmistakably Pacific Northwest.
